foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Must understand GERD pathophysiology, diagnosis, and failed medical therapy criteria before considering surgery

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Pre-operative manometry is mandatory to rule out motility disorders and guide choice of fundoplication (Nissen vs Toupet)

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Anti-reflux surgery aims to restore LES competence — requires understanding of normal LES mechanics

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Fundoplication (Nissen, Toupet, Dor) is the primary surgical procedure for GERD

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Barrett's esophagus from chronic GERD is a key indication for considering anti-reflux surgery

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Hiatal dissection and crural repair require detailed knowledge of GEJ and diaphragmatic anatomy

objectives: SU28.6: Describe the clinical features, investigations and principles of
SU28.5: Describe the applied anatomy and physiology of esophagus
integration: This postgraduate-level roadmap connects Surgical Management of GERD across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
